task_completion.description: Navigate the map view to North Sentinel Island
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is centered on North Sentinel Island (approx 11.55°N, 92.24°E), showing a roughly square, forested island surrounded by a reef.

task_completion.description: Select and activate the polygon or area measurement tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Add Polygon', 'Ruler', or 'Measure Area' tool is active. The cursor may be a crosshair, or a dialog box for the new polygon is open.

task_completion.description: Trace the coastline of the island (land/water boundary)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A polygon is drawn around the island. The line follows the edge of the dark green vegetation/land, NOT the outer edge of the lighter blue submerged reef.
In the polygon properties or name field, the text 'North_Sentinel_Island_Boundary' is entered.

task_completion.description: Verify the calculated area is approximately 60 km²
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement dialog shows an area value close to 60 square kilometers (e.g., 55-65 km², or ~6000 hectares).

task_completion.description: Export the polygon as a KML file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is visible. The filename is set to 'north_sentinel_boundary.kml' and the folder path includes '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent uses a GUI mapping application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble, QGIS) interface, not a terminal-only session or python script execution for the primary task.

integrity.description: Ensure the polygon is created via interaction, not pasted
integrity.visual_evidence: Multiple vertices (points) are visible along the polygon perimeter, indicating the shape was traced or adjusted, rather than a simple bounding box or pre-loaded shape.

integrity.description: Ensure the KML is generated by the software, not hand-coded
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not typing raw XML/KML code into a text editor to fake the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: North Sentinel Island is located at 11.55°N, 92.24°E. It is a densely forested island surrounded by a distinct coral reef. The task requires tracing the land boundary (vegetation edge), not the outer reef edge. The expected land area is approximately 60 km² (59.67 km²).
